response.output:
Web search results for "Kingdom Rush barracks soldier mechanic how soldiers spawn rally point movement":

1. Knights Barracks - Kingdom Rush Wiki - Fandom
When upgrading a barracks it will instantly spawn soldiers that are dead and will completely restore the health of injured ones. ... Improves rally point range (

2. Militia Barracks | Kingdom Rush Wiki - Fandom
Improves rally point range (by 20%) and reduces soldier training time. (Respawn time is reduced by 3 seconds for Holy Order, and by 2 seconds for the others.).

3. There is no reason for rally points to be in the game. : r/CrusaderKings
Rally points are a mechanic that made sense in CK2, when armies were raised in their respective homes and had to march to merge into a proper army.

4. Paladin Barracks Skills Breakdown – Kingdom Rush Battles PvP Tower Defense Guide : Ironhide Game Studio
## Paladin Barracks Skills Breakdown – Defend the Lines in Kingdom Rush Battles Print. The Paladin Barracks is a fundamental melee tower, spawning soldiers that block and fight enemies, creating chokepoints in this PvP tower defense game. Use these holy guardians to stall waves, protect key towers, and give your other defenses time to deal damage. The Paladin Barracks spawns two soldiers that block enemies and attack melee units. As a basic defensive tower, it’s best paired with artillery or high-damage towers to maximize effectiveness. Pro tip: Place barracks where soldiers will be in continuous combat to maximize Iron Will benefits. ### Defense Skill: Holy Strike — Area Damage. HEALING LIGHT regenerates the health of Paladins over time, ensuring your soldiers can hold lanes longer and stall key enemies. The Paladin Barracks is ideal for stalling enemies and protecting chokepoints in this PvP tower defense game. Use it to delay enemies, protect key lanes, and give your other towers time to destroy waves.

5. Kingdom Rush - the wonderful Campaign level design
The 4 basic tower types are as follows: Archer Towers are inexpensive and have a good rate of fire, Mage Guilds deal high damage that pierces armor, Artillery Towers (which will be called cannons) deal area damage, and Barracks sends out 3 soldiers who block enemies. Leveling up towers, which is now allowed for a gold price, is consistently around in TD games, but KR gives it a purpose: it allows for creating a better kill zone where your soldiers are, preventing enemies from surviving as easily before being reinforced, which is how Barracks buildings can actually backfire in their usage: they only stop the baddies, but while they're doing, more baddies can come in and create an unwelcome formation. You'll want to position wisely, because you actually need whatever money you save by doing so to start using leveled up towers now in order to deal with the 2 new enemy types.

Sources:
[1] Knights Barracks - Kingdom Rush Wiki - Fandom (https://kingdomrushtd.fandom.com/wiki/Knights_Barracks)
[2] Militia Barracks | Kingdom Rush Wiki - Fandom (https://kingdomrushtd.fandom.com/wiki/Militia_Barracks)
[3] There is no reason for rally points to be in the game. : r/CrusaderKings (https://www.reddit.com/r/CrusaderKings/comments/1ga9xjd/there_is_no_reason_for_rally_points_to_be_in_the)
[4] Paladin Barracks Skills Breakdown – Kingdom Rush Battles PvP Tower Defense Guide : Ironhide Game Studio (https://support.ironhidegames.com/support/solutions/articles/4000223657-paladin-barracks-skills-breakdown-defend-the-lines-in-kingdom-rush-battles)
[5] Kingdom Rush - the wonderful Campaign level design (https://www.gamedeveloper.com/design/kingdom-rush---the-wonderful-campaign-level-design)

toolCalls.description:
Searches the internet/web for information using a search query. Use this tool when you need to search for information online but do NOT have a specific URL. Returns search results with titles, snippets, and source URLs.

When to use:
- User asks to "search the web" or "find information about X"
- You need current information, news, or documentation from the internet
- You need to discover web pages related to a topic
- You have a search query but no specific URL

When NOT to use:
- You already have a specific URL (use web_fetch instead)
- User provides a direct URL to access

Example: web_search(query="latest AI developments")

toolCalls.name: read_file

in: Kingdom Rush, Kingdom Rush: Frontiers, Towers, Melee Towers


KNIGHTS BARRACKS


Sign In to Save Save Edit
 * Edit source
 * History
 * Purge
 * Talk (0)


KNIGHTS BARRACKS

 * Kingdom Rush
 * Frontiers





TYPE

Melee


LEVEL

3


INTRODUCED

Twin RiversKR
Sape OasisKRF


BUILD COST

160 Gold


HP

180 (Casual)

150 (Normal and Veteran)


DAMAGE

6-10


ATTACK RATE

1.66s Flash
1.36s Steam/Mobile and IOS



ARMOR

Low (30%)


RESPAWN

10 seconds


UPGRADES

Holy OrderKR
Barbarian Mead HallKR
Assassin's GuildKRF
Knights TemplarKRF



“ Have at thee! ”






The Knights Barracks is a Level 3 Melee Tower, upgraded from the Footmen Barracks. It trains three knights, professional soldiers who will stop anything in their path. The tower is the same in both Kingdom Rush and Kingdom Rush: Frontiers, with only a change in appearance. They regenerate 10 HP per second when not in combat.


CONTENTS

 * 1 Overview
 * 2 Range
 * 3 Strategy
 * 4 Additional Stats
   * 4.1 Kingdom Rush
   * 4.2 Kingdom rush: Frontiers
 * 5 Upgrades
   * 5.1 Kingdom Rush
   * 5.2 Kingdom Rush: Frontiers
 * 6 Related Upgrades
   * 6.1 Kingdom Rush
   * 6.2 Kingdom Rush: Frontiers
 * 7 Quotes
 * 8 Trivia


OVERVIEW[]

Knights are professional soldiers with heavy armor. Dedicated to his majesty, they will stop your enemies' advance.

Knights are soldiers at the peak of their training. They are stronger versions of Footmen, with more health and armor. They deal slightly more than twice the damage of Footmen to enemies.


RANGE[]

(KR) Standard range without Upgrades
(KRF) Standard range without Upgrades
 * Same as the Level 1 Militia Barracks (and any other Barracks, whether advanced or not)


STRATEGY[]

 * While having significantly better stats than Footmen Barracks, the Knights still share the same weaknesses - large hordes, ranged enemies and flying enemies. Support from other towers is crucial.
 * When upgrading a barracks it will instantly spawn soldiers that are dead and will completely restore the health of injured ones. Use this against bosses or enemies that deal lots of damage/have a lot of health!


ADDITIONAL STATS[]


KINGDOM RUSH[]

 * Kingdom Rush Toughness Training and Endurance Training gives +15 health respectively, up to total +30 health.
 * Better Armor increases their resistance against physical attacks with 10%, increasing their natural armor to 40%.
 * In total with all upgrades, their EHP is 300 points of physical damage per soldier (3 soldiers equals 900 EHP)
 * Total cost of the Knights Barracks is 340 Gold.
 * Gold spend per EHP (for all 3 soldiers) is 0.27


KINGDOM RUSH: FRONTIERS[]

 * Boot Camp gives +15 health

 * Defensive Stance and Veteran Squad each give +10% armor, increasing their natural armor to 50%.
 * In total with all upgrades, their EHP* is 330 points of physical damage per soldier (3 soldiers equals 990 EHP)
 * Total cost of the Knights Barracks is 340 Gold.
 * Gold spend per EHP (for all 3 soldiers) is 0.24.

This ratio makes them the most cost efficient investment for Soldiers.

Note: Effective Hit Points = how much damage a unit needs to take before dying.


UPGRADES[]


KINGDOM RUSH[]

Holy Order

Barbarian Mead Hall


KINGDOM RUSH: FRONTIERS[]

Knights Templar

Assassin's Guild


RELATED UPGRADES[]


KINGDOM RUSH[]

 * Toughness Training (1 Star)
   * Barracks train soldiers with more health. (+10% health)
 * Better Armor (1 Star)
   * Barracks train soldiers with improved armor. (+10% armor, percentage points)
 * Improved Deployment (2 Stars)
   * Improves rally point range (by 20%) and reduces soldier training time.
     * (Respawn time is reduced by 3 seconds for Holy Order, and by 2 seconds for the others.)
 * Endurance Training (2 Stars)
   * Barracks train soldiers with even more health. (+10% health, stacks additively for 20% total)
 * Spiked Armor (3 Stars)
   * When attacked, soldier's spiked armor return a 10% of the damage to the attacker. Spiked Armor also affects Reinforcements and Heroes. (dealt as True Damage)


KINGDOM RUSH: FRONTIERS[]

 * Defensive Stance (1 Star)
   * Barracks train soldiers with better armor. (+10% armor, percentage points)
 * Boot Camp (1 Star)
   * Barracks train more resilient soldiers. (+10% health)
 * Esprit de Corps (2 Stars)
   * Increases barrack rally point range (+20%) and healing rate (+20% per second).
 * Veteran Squad (2 Stars)
   * Soldiers are trained faster and with improved armor. (-2 seconds of respawn time, +10% armor, stacks additively)
 * Courage (3 Stars)
   * While in combat, soldiers, mercenaries & reinforcements regenerate 1% HP per second. (also works out of combat)


QUOTES[]

 * "For honor and glory!"
 * "For the king!"
 * "Have at thee!"
 * "Charge!"


TRIVIA[]

 * Knight units use the same names as the Militia Barracks.

Web search results for "Kingdom Rush barracks rally point mechanic soldiers wait at rally point then engage enemy path":

1. Militia Barracks | Kingdom Rush Wiki - Fandom
By putting the rally points of two barracks at the same place, the two teams of soldiers will engage an individual powerful enemy as a group, inflicting more

2. There is no reason for rally points to be in the game. : r/CrusaderKings
Rally points are a mechanic that made sense in CK2, when armies were raised in their respective homes and had to march to merge into a proper army.

3. Kingdom Rush - the wonderful Campaign level design
The 4 basic tower types are as follows: Archer Towers are inexpensive and have a good rate of fire, Mage Guilds deal high damage that pierces armor, Artillery Towers (which will be called cannons) deal area damage, and Barracks sends out 3 soldiers who block enemies. Leveling up towers, which is now allowed for a gold price, is consistently around in TD games, but KR gives it a purpose: it allows for creating a better kill zone where your soldiers are, preventing enemies from surviving as easily before being reinforced, which is how Barracks buildings can actually backfire in their usage: they only stop the baddies, but while they're doing, more baddies can come in and create an unwelcome formation. You'll want to position wisely, because you actually need whatever money you save by doing so to start using leveled up towers now in order to deal with the 2 new enemy types.

4. Rally Point Solution | Paradox Interactive Forums

in: Kingdom Rush, Kingdom Rush: Frontiers, Towers, Melee Towers


MILITIA BARRACKS


Sign In to Save Save Edit
 * Edit source
 * History
 * Purge
 * Talk (2)


MILITIA BARRACKS

 * Kingdom Rush
 * Frontiers





TYPE

Melee


LEVEL

1


INTRODUCED

SouthportKR
HammerholdKRF


BUILD COST

70


HP

50

60 (Casual)


DAMAGE

1-3


ATTACK RATE

1.0s


ARMOR

None


RESPAWN

10 seconds


UPGRADES

Footmen Barracks



“ For honor and glory! ”






The Militia Barracks is a Level 1 Melee Tower. It spawns three militia which block and attack enemies. The tower is the same in both Kingdom Rush and Kingdom Rush: Frontiers, with only a change in appearance. They regenerate 5 HP per second when not in combat.


CONTENTS

 * 1 Overview
 * 2 Range
 * 3 Strategy
   * 3.1 Strengths
   * 3.2 Weaknesses
 * 4 Additional Stats
   * 4.1 Kingdom Rush
   * 4.2 Kingdom Rush: Frontiers
 * 5 Related Upgrades
   * 5.1 Kingdom Rush
   * 5.2 Kingdom Rush: Frontiers
 * 6 Quotes
 * 7 Trivia


OVERVIEW[]

Trains militia, tough soldiers that block and damage your enemies.

Militia are the most basic soldier available, merely civilians with very little training, armor, and weapons. However, with additional tower support, they can hold their own against even a much larger army. They can fall pretty quickly to Orcs, so it appears that they aren't as tough as the tower description says. They can be upgraded to Footmen Barracks for 110 gold.


RANGE[]

(KR) Standard range without Upgrades
(KRF) Standard range without Upgrades


STRATEGY[]

 * Try to place barracks near a choke point or places where many towers can hit the enemies stalled by your soldiers. Due to the low cost of a barracks, it can sometimes pay off to build a lot of these towers in the back to stop an enemy breakthrough in an emergency.
 * It can be effective to let your militia evade some tougher enemies in favor of blocking less powerful ones. Dead soldiers provide no benefit to their supporting towers. Bandits are notorious for making short work of your level 1 soldiers, so do not use militias to block them.
 * By putting the rally points of two barracks at the same place, the two teams of soldiers will engage an individual powerful enemy as a group, inflicting more damage and taking less damage. Do not use this tactic against enemies with area attack capability (Yetis, Magma Elementals, etc.) since those can damage all soldiers at once, able to kill them quickly.
 * The damage of the militia is the lowest of any tower; support is vital to winning the game!
 * The barracks should be upgraded soon after any upgrading any supporting towers, as soldier survivability will otherwise not keep up with the quality of the enemies in later waves.
 * Upgrading barracks replenishes the troops and the HP of existing soldiers immediately, use it as an advantageous stalling if you need to.


STRENGTHS[]

 * In terms of defensive capabilities, militia can only deal with the most early waves consisting of Goblins, Orcs or Wulves. The barracks soldiers might be able to take out a goblin or two by themselves, but it is best to rely on other towers for the offence.


WEAKNESSES[]

 * Almost every enemy higher ranked than Orcs will make short work of your militia. Some strong ones are even capable of taking out all three soldiers in one hit from afar. Also, ranged enemies and flying monsters simply pierce through or fly over your blockade.


ADDITIONAL STATS[]


KINGDOM RUSH[]

 * Toughness Training and Endurance Training gives +5 health respectively, up to total +10 health.
 * Better Armor increases their resistance against physical attacks with 10%
 * In total with all upgrades, their EHP* is 66 points of physical damage per soldier (3 soldiers equals 198 EHP)
 * Gold spend per EHP (for all 3 soldiers) is 0.35


KINGDOM RUSH: FRONTIERS[]

 * Boot Camp gives +5 health
 * Defensive Stance and Veteran Squad give +10% armor for a total of +20%
 * In total with all upgrades, their EHP* is 68 points of physical damage per soldier (3 soldiers equals 204 EHP)
 * Gold spend per EHP (for all 3 soldiers) is 0.34

Note: Effective Hit Points = how much damage a unit needs to take before dying.


RELATED UPGRADES[]


KINGDOM RUSH[]

 * Toughness Training (1 Star)
   * Barracks train soldiers with more health. (+10% health)
 * Better Armor (1 Star)
   * Barracks train soldiers with improved armor. (+10% armor, percentage points)
 * Improved Deployment (2 Stars)
   * Improves rally point range (by 20%) and reduces soldier training time.
     * (Respawn time is reduced by 3 seconds for Holy Order, and by 2 seconds for the others.)
 * Endurance Training (2 Stars)
   * Barracks train soldiers with even more health. (+10% health, stacks additively for 20% total)
 * Spiked Armor (3 Stars)
   * When attacked, soldier's spiked armor return a 10% of the damage to the attacker. Spiked Armor also affects Reinforcements and Heroes. (dealt as True Damage)


KINGDOM RUSH: FRONTIERS[]

 * Defensive Stance (1 Star)
   * Barracks train soldiers with better armor. (+10% armor, percentage points)
 * Boot Camp (1 Star)
   * Barracks train more resilient soldiers. (+10% health)
 * Esprit de Corps (2 Stars)
   * Increases barrack rally point range (+20%) and healing rate (+20% per second).
 * Veteran Squad (2 Stars)
   * Soldiers are trained faster and with improved armor. (-2 seconds of respawn time, +10% armor, stacks additively)
 * Courage (3 Stars)
   * While in combat, soldiers, mercenaries & reinforcements regenerate 1% HP per second. (also works out of combat)


QUOTES[]

 * "For honor and glory!"
 * "For the king!"
 * "Have at thee!"
 * "Charge!"


TRIVIA[]

 * "For the king!"
   * A quote made by a Knight unit in Warcraft III.
 * "Have at thee!"
   * A battle cry from Marvel's Thor. This is the first occurrence of a quote from this character, while more were later added when the hero Thor was introduced.
   * It could also be a reference to Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet when the character Tybalt yells "Have at thee, coward!"
 * The shield and swords in the top of the tower could be a reference to Armor Games, the Flash distrubuter of Ironhide Studios.
 * These names are used in both Kingdom Rush and Kingdom Rush: Frontiers.
   * Allister

messages.content:
现在我清楚了！根据王国保卫战 wiki 的资料，问题有两个：

**问题1：士兵不应该在兵营位置生成，而应该出现在「集结点(rally point)」上**
- KR 中，兵营建造后士兵出现在**集结点**，不是兵营本身
- 集结点可以被玩家**拖拽调整**，通常放在敌人路径旁边
- 士兵待在集结点等待敌人，当敌人进入**集结点范围内**，士兵跑过去拦截

**问题2：士兵不移动是因为当前代码中 `FindEnemy` 用 `_barracks.position` + `engageRange` 搜索敌人，但士兵的初始位置和兵营位置不一致时逻辑混乱**

让我修复这些问题：

toolCalls.name: job_create

args.subject: Add rally point system to BarracksAttack
args.description:
In Kingdom Rush, barracks soldiers spawn at a "rally point" (typically on/near the enemy path), not at the tower position. The rally point is adjustable by the player. When idle, soldiers stand at the rally point. When enemies enter the rally point range, soldiers run to engage them. After combat, soldiers return to the rally point.

Changes needed:
1. Add rallyPoint Transform to BarracksAttack - spawn soldiers there, soldiers return there
2. Default rally point should be on/near the closest path point from the tower
3. Soldier.FindEnemy() should use rally point position instead of barracks position
4. Soldier.ReturnToBarracks() should return to rally point
5. Add visual indicator for rally point (small circle/marker)
6. Allow player to drag rally point position
args.activeForm: Adding rally point system to barracks

toolCalls.description:
Use this tool to create a structured task list for your current coding session. This helps you track progress, organize complex tasks, and demonstrate thoroughness to the user.
It also helps the user understand the progress of the job and overall progress of their requests.

## When to Use This Tool
Use this tool proactively in these scenarios:
- Complex multi-step tasks - When a job requires 3 or more distinct steps or actions
- Non-trivial and complex tasks - Work that requires careful planning or multiple operations
- Plan mode - When using plan mode, create a job list to track the work
- User explicitly requests job list - When the user directly asks you to use the job list
- User provides multiple tasks - When users provide a list of things to be done (numbered or comma-separated)
- After receiving new instructions - Immediately capture user requirements as jobs
- When you start working on a job - Mark it as in_progress BEFORE beginning work
- After completing a job - Mark it as completed and add any new follow-up jobs discovered during implementation

## When NOT to Use This Tool
Skip using this tool when:
- There is only a single, straightforward job
- The job is trivial and tracking it provides no organizational benefit
- The job can be completed in less than 3 trivial steps
- The job is purely conversational or informational

NOTE that you should not use this tool if there is only one trivial job to do. In this case you are better off just doing the job directly.

## Job Fields
- **subject**: A brief, actionable title in imperative form (e.g., "Fix authentication bug in login flow")
- **description**: Detailed description of what needs to be done, including context and acceptance criteria
- **activeForm**: Present continuous form shown in spinner when job is in_progress (e.g., "Fixing authentication bug"). This is displayed to the user while you work on the job.

**IMPORTANT**: Always provide activeForm when creating jobs. The subject should be imperative ("Run tests") while activeForm should be present continuous ("Running tests"). All jobs are created with status `pending`.

## Tips
- Create jobs with clear, specific subjects that describe the outcome
- Include enough detail in the description for another agent to understand and complete the job
- After creating jobs, use job_update to set up dependencies (blocks/blockedBy) if needed
- Check job_list first to avoid creating duplicate jobs
- Use `allowDuplicate: true` only when you intentionally need a second open job with the same normalized subject

toolCalls.description:
Use this tool to update a job in the job list.

## When to Use This Tool
**Mark jobs as resolved:**
- When you have completed the work described in a job
- When a job is no longer needed or has been superseded
- IMPORTANT: Always mark your assigned jobs as resolved when you finish them
- After resolving, call job_list to find your next job
- After completing your current job, look for the next available job instead of stopping
- Available jobs are typically: status = 'pending', no owner, and no open blockedBy dependencies
- **Prefer working on jobs in ID order** (lowest ID first) when multiple jobs are available, as earlier jobs often set up context for later ones
- ONLY mark a job as completed when you have FULLY accomplished it
- If you encounter errors, blockers, or cannot finish, keep the job as in_progress
- When blocked, create a new job describing what needs to be resolved
- Never mark a job as completed if:
  - Tests are failing
  - Implementation is partial
  - You encountered unresolved errors
  - You couldn't find necessary files or dependencies

**Delete jobs:**
- When a job is no longer relevant or was created in error
- Setting status to `deleted` permanently removes the job

**Update job details:**
- When requirements change or become clearer
- When establishing dependencies between jobs

## Fields You Can Update
- **status**: The job status (see Status Workflow below)
- **subject**: Change the job title (imperative form, e.g., "Run tests")
- **description**: Change the job description
- **activeForm**: Present continuous form shown in spinner when in_progress (e.g., "Running tests")
- **owner**: Change the job owner identifier. When a job is auto-linked to a `task`, this is typically the execution task ID (e.g. `task-1`).
- **metadata**: Merge metadata keys into the job (set a key to null to delete it)
- **addBlocks**: Mark jobs that cannot start until this one completes
- **addBlockedBy**: Mark jobs that must complete before this one can start
- **removeBlocks**: Remove jobs from this job's blocks list
- **removeBlockedBy**: Remove jobs from this job's blocked-by list

## Status Workflow
Status progresses: `pending` → `in_progress` → `completed`
A job can also move to `failed` when a linked task fails, then back to `in_progress` for retry.
Use `deleted` to permanently remove a job.

## Staleness
Make sure to read a job's latest state using `job_get` before updating it.

## Continuation

- After marking a job completed, use `job_list` to check for newly unblocked work
- If a clear unblocked job exists, continue with it rather than pausing for an unnecessary decision
- If no job is available, or remaining work is genuinely blocked or ambiguous, then ask the user or update dependencies accordingly

## Examples
Mark job as in progress when starting work:
```json
{"jobId": "1", "status": "in_progress"}
```
Mark job as completed after finishing work:
```json
{"jobId": "1", "status": "completed"}
```
Delete a job:
```json
{"jobId": "1", "status": "deleted"}
```
Claim a job by setting owner:
```json
{"jobId": "1", "owner": "task-1"}
```
Set up job dependencies:
```json
{"jobId": "2", "addBlockedBy": ["1"]}
```
Remove a dependency after recovering:
```json
{"jobId": "2", "removeBlockedBy": ["1"]}
```

toolCalls.description:
Replaces text within a file. Use this tool for targeted edits to existing files.

The tool replaces exactly ONE occurrence of `old_string` with `new_string` by default. The `old_string` MUST uniquely identify the specific instance to change — unless `replace_all` is set to true, in which case every occurrence of `old_string` will be replaced. Use the read_file tool to establish the current file state before the first text replacement. If the tool reports that the file changed since it was read, re-read it before retrying.

If you need to replace the full contents of an existing file, use `write_file` instead.
If `old_string` is empty, the tool treats the operation as creating a new file. This is only valid when the target file does not already exist.
Do not use an empty `old_string` to overwrite an existing file.

The user has the ability to modify the `new_string` content. If modified, this will be stated in the response.

Expectation for required parameters:
1. `file_path` MUST be an absolute path; otherwise an error will be thrown.
2. Prefer exact literal text for `old_string`, including relevant surrounding context and matching whitespace, indentation, and newlines when possible.
3. Prefer exact literal text for `new_string`, and ensure the resulting code is correct and idiomatic.
4. NEVER escape `old_string` or `new_string`, that would break the exact literal text requirement.

**Important:** Exact literal matches are the most reliable. The tool may also apply limited deterministic normalization for whitespace, indentation, and escaping, but do not rely on fallback matching when you can provide the exact text. The edit will FAIL if `old_string` is not unique in the file. Either provide a larger string with more surrounding context to make it unique or use `replace_all` to change every instance of `old_string`.
Use `replace_all` for replacing and renaming strings across the file. This parameter is useful if you want to rename a variable for instance.

When idle, soldiers stand at the rally point. When enemies enter the rally point range, soldiers run to engage them. After combat, soldiers return to the rally point.\n\nChanges needed:\n1. Add rallyPoint Transform to BarracksAttack - spawn soldiers there, soldiers return there\n2. Default rally point should be on/near the closest path point from the tower\n3. Soldier.FindEnemy() should use rally point position instead of barracks position\n4. Soldier.ReturnToBarracks() should return to rally point\n5. Add visual indicator for rally point (small circle/marker)\n6. Allow player to drag rally point position",

toolCalls.description:
Use this tool to update a job in the job list.

## When to Use This Tool
**Mark jobs as resolved:**
- When you have completed the work described in a job
- When a job is no longer needed or has been superseded
- IMPORTANT: Always mark your assigned jobs as resolved when you finish them
- After resolving, call job_list to find your next job
- After completing your current job, look for the next available job instead of stopping
- Available jobs are typically: status = 'pending', no owner, and no open blockedBy dependencies
- **Prefer working on jobs in ID order** (lowest ID first) when multiple jobs are available, as earlier jobs often set up context for later ones
- ONLY mark a job as completed when you have FULLY accomplished it
- If you encounter errors, blockers, or cannot finish, keep the job as in_progress
- When blocked, create a new job describing what needs to be resolved
- Never mark a job as completed if:
  - Tests are failing
  - Implementation is partial
  - You encountered unresolved errors
  - You couldn't find necessary files or dependencies

**Delete jobs:**
- When a job is no longer relevant or was created in error
- Setting status to `deleted` permanently removes the job

**Update job details:**
- When requirements change or become clearer
- When establishing dependencies between jobs

## Fields You Can Update
- **status**: The job status (see Status Workflow below)
- **subject**: Change the job title (imperative form, e.g., "Run tests")
- **description**: Change the job description
- **activeForm**: Present continuous form shown in spinner when in_progress (e.g., "Running tests")
- **owner**: Change the job owner identifier. When a job is auto-linked to a `task`, this is typically the execution task ID (e.g. `task-1`).
- **metadata**: Merge metadata keys into the job (set a key to null to delete it)
- **addBlocks**: Mark jobs that cannot start until this one completes
- **addBlockedBy**: Mark jobs that must complete before this one can start
- **removeBlocks**: Remove jobs from this job's blocks list
- **removeBlockedBy**: Remove jobs from this job's blocked-by list

## Status Workflow
Status progresses: `pending` → `in_progress` → `completed`
A job can also move to `failed` when a linked task fails, then back to `in_progress` for retry.
Use `deleted` to permanently remove a job.

## Staleness
Make sure to read a job's latest state using `job_get` before updating it.

## Continuation

- After marking a job completed, use `job_list` to check for newly unblocked work
- If a clear unblocked job exists, continue with it rather than pausing for an unnecessary decision
- If no job is available, or remaining work is genuinely blocked or ambiguous, then ask the user or update dependencies accordingly

## Examples
Mark job as in progress when starting work:
```json
{"jobId": "1", "status": "in_progress"}
```
Mark job as completed after finishing work:
```json
{"jobId": "1", "status": "completed"}
```
Delete a job:
```json
{"jobId": "1", "status": "deleted"}
```
Claim a job by setting owner:
```json
{"jobId": "1", "owner": "task-1"}
```
Set up job dependencies:
```json
{"jobId": "2", "addBlockedBy": ["1"]}
```
Remove a dependency after recovering:
```json
{"jobId": "2", "removeBlockedBy": ["1"]}
```

messages.content:
修复完成！以下是参照 Kingdom Rush wiki 做的改动总结：

**根本问题：**
1. ❌ 旧代码士兵在**兵营位置**生成 → 路径上的敌人检测不到 → 士兵不移动
2. ❌ 旧代码搜索敌人以兵营为中心 → 兵营离路径远 → engageRange 够不到

**参照 Kingdom Rush 的修复：**

| Kingdom Rush 机制 | 旧代码 | 修复后 |
|---|---|---|
| 士兵在 **Rally Point（集结点）** 待命 | 士兵在兵营位置生成 | 士兵在集结点生成 |
| 集结点默认在**敌人路径最近点** | 无集结点概念 | `FindDefaultRallyPosition()` 自动找到路径最近点 |
| 敌人进入集结点范围 → 士兵跑过去拦截 | 从兵营位置搜索敌人 | 从集结点搜索敌人 |
| 战斗结束 → 士兵**走回集结点** | 走回兵营 | `ReturnToRallyPoint()` 走回集结点 |
| 集结点可**拖拽调整** | 无 | `MoveRallyPoint()` 支持拖拽 |
| 集结点有**黄色圆圈标记** | 无 | `CreateRallyPointMarker()` 显示范围圈 |

现在进入游戏放置兵营塔，士兵应该会自动出现在路径附近的集结点，并正常跑向敌人拦截了。
小兵还是在出生的不会追击敌人

<think>The user says soldiers still don't chase enemies - they just spawn and stay in place. Let me debug this by entering Play Mode and checking what's happening with the soldier logic.

The key issue is likely in the flow:
1. Tower.FindTarget() detects enemies
2. Tower calls Attack() on BarracksAttack
3. BarracksAttack.SpawnAllSoldiers() creates soldiers
4. Soldiers are in Idle state
5. Soldier.FindEnemy() should detect enemies and switch to MovingToEnemy

But wait - the soldiers use FindEnemy() in their Update() loop, which searches from the rally point. But the BarracksAttack also has AutoAssignTargets() which should assign targets to idle soldiers.

Let me check the flow more carefully:

1. Tower.Update() calls FindTarget() - this uses _attack.GetEffectiveAttackRange() which returns soldierData.engageRange
2. If target found, Tower.Attack() calls _attack.Attack(_currentTarget)
3. BarracksAttack.Attack() spawns soldiers and calls AssignTarget(target)
4. AssignTarget() calls soldier.EngageTarget(target) for idle soldiers
5. Soldier.EngageTarget() sets _state = MovingToEnemy

But wait - there might be a timing issue. Let me think about this...

The Tower.FindTarget() searches from transform.position (the tower position), not from the rally point. So if the tower is far from the path, it might not detect enemies in range to trigger the initial Attack() call.

Actually looking at Tower.FindBestTarget():
```csharp
float actualAttackRange = _attack != null ? _attack.GetEffectiveAttackRange() : _currentStats.attackRange;
List<Enemy.Enemy> enemiesInRange = spawner.GetEnemiesInRange(transform.position, actualAttackRange);
```

It searches from `transform.position` (tower position) with the engage range. If the tower is far from the path, this won't find enemies. The Tower itself needs to detect enemies first to trigger the attack flow.

But even if Tower doesn't find targets, the Soldier.FindEnemy() should still work independently in each soldier's Update(). Let me re-read the soldier code...

In Soldier.Update(), when state is Idle, it calls FindEnemy(). FindEnemy() searches from `_homePoint.position` (rally point) with engage range. This should find enemies near the path.

Wait, let me look at the problem more carefully. The soldier's FindEnemy() uses:
```csharp
EnemySpawner spawner = FindObjectOfType<EnemySpawner>();
if (spawner == null) return;

var enemies = spawner.GetEnemiesInRange(searchOrigin, _data.engageRange);
```

If EnemySpawner is not found, it returns early. Let me check if the spawner works correctly.

Actually, I think the issue might be simpler. Let me enter Play Mode and check with a C# script to debug what's happening with the soldiers.

Let me also consider: maybe the issue is that the soldier's `engageRange` is too small (3f by default in SoldierData). If the rally point is slightly off the path, 3 units might not be enough.

Let me enter play mode, place a barracks, and debug.</think>让我进入 Play 模式调试，看看到底哪一步出了问题。

messages.content: 问题清楚了！3 个士兵全部卡在 `Returning` 状态，但位置 (9.50, 4.12) 和集结点 (10.18, 4.11) 之间距离很小，应该早就到了。而且 z=-1 导致 2D 游戏里可能有问题。让我进一步检查：

toolCalls.name: execute_csharp_script
toolCalls.description: Executes a C# script in Unity Editor using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Scripting. Captures and returns logs generated during script execution. The C# scripting package must be available in Unity. Supports inline script code or loading from a file path.

messages.content:
找到了！士兵距离集结点 0.853，但阈值是 0.3，所以他们在 `Returning` 状态。但问题是 **z 坐标不一致**（soldier z=-1.00, rally z=-0.48），士兵在 2D 游戏里可能在视觉上看不到移动。而且士兵似乎没在移动——`Returning` 状态应该是走回集结点的，距离 > 0.3 应该持续移动。

让我检查 ReturnToRallyPoint 是否真的在执行移动：

messages.content: Rigidbody2D 是 Kinematic！这是问题所在——`transform.position +=` 在 Kinematic Rigidbody2D 上不生效（2D 物理会覆盖位置）。必须用 `rb.MovePosition()` 或者 `rb.velocity` 来移动。

messages.content:
✅ 0 error！修复完成。

**问题根因：** Soldier prefab 上有 `Rigidbody2D`（Kinematic 模式），`transform.position +=` 在 Kinematic Rigidbody2D 上不生效，2D 物理引擎会覆盖位置。必须用 `Rigidbody2D.MovePosition()` 才能正确移动。

**修复内容：**
1. `Soldier.cs` 添加了 `_rb` 缓存 `Rigidbody2D` 引用
2. `MoveTowardsEnemy()` — 改用 `_rb.MovePosition(newPos)` 替代 `transform.position +=`
3. `ReturnToRallyPoint()` — 同样改用 `_rb.MovePosition(newPos)`
4. 带 fallback：如果无 Rigidbody2D 则仍用 `transform.position`

现在进入游戏放置兵营，士兵应该能正常跑向敌人并拦截了。你可以试试看！
还是不动为什么啊，没让你改界面之前还是可以动的，改了界面就不动了

<think>用户说改界面之前士兵是可以动的，改了界面之后就不动了。让我想想改界面做了什么——是 Kingdom Rush UI restyle（KRRestyleHUD.cs）。但那只是修改 UI 元素的颜色/样式，不应该影响士兵移动逻辑。

不过用户说"改了界面就不动了"，让我回顾一下改动：

1. 添加了 attackDamage 到 EnemyData
2. 修改了 Tower.FindTarget 使用 GetEffectiveAttackRange
3. 修改了 BarracksAttack 的 CanAttack、GetEffectiveAttackRange
4. 添加了 Rally Point 系统
5. 修改了 Soldier.cs 的移动逻辑（Rigidbody2D.MovePosition）

等等，用户说的是"改界面之前还是可以动的"——那意味着士兵之前是能移动的！之前用 `transform.position +=` 是可以动的，但现在用了 `Rigidbody2D.MovePosition` 反而不行了？

不对，用户之前反映的原始问题是"小兵不移动"和"兵营建造完就出现小兵在敌人的移动路径上生成"。然后我做了 Rally Point 修改，改了 Soldier 的 Initialize 参数（从 Transform barracks 变成 Transform homePoint），加了 Rigidbody2D.MovePosition 等。

但用户现在说"改界面之前还是可以动的"。让我重新理解：
- "改界面"可能指的是这次 session 的所有改动（包括 rally point + Rigidbody2D fix）
- 或者真的是 UI restyle 导致的问题

让我先停止 Play Mode，然后仔细检查问题。最可能的原因是 Rigidbody2D.MovePosition 在某些情况下不工作——比如如果 Rigidbody2D 是 Kinematic 且没有正确的模拟设置。

让我直接在 Play Mode 下测试，打印更详细的调试信息。

实际上，让我重新思考：用户说"没让你改界面之前还是可以动的"。这意味着在 UI restyle 之前，士兵是可以动的。UI restyle 改动包括 KRRestyleHUD.cs，但那个只改 UI Canvas 元素。

等等，回看之前的改动历史，更可能的解释是：
- 在我做 Rally Point 重构 + Rigidbody2D MovePosition 修改之前，士兵是可以动的
- 我的修改引入了 bug

让我直接进 Play Mode 验证 MovePosition 是否生效，并添加调试日志。</think>让我直接在 Play 模式里精确定位问题：

thinkingSummaries.text: Analyzing soldier movement regression after UI changes

messages.content:
`MovePosition` 完全不生效！Kinematic Rigidbody2D 的 `MovePosition` 在 2D 里需要等到物理步才生效，而且 z=-1 可能有问题。既然之前 `transform.position +=` 是可以动的，问题可能是我之前的 Rally Point 修改改变了初始化流程导致士兵没有正确初始化。

让我直接回退到最简单的方式——去掉 Rigidbody2D 上的 Kinematic，或者直接用 `transform.position`：

toolCalls.name: unity_editor
toolCalls.description: Controls Unity Editor state (play/pause/stop), retrieves project information and full UnityCurrentState, manages editor tools, windows, selection, tags, and layers. Use get_current_state for comprehensive state snapshot.

messages.content: Soldier prefab 上有 Kinematic Rigidbody2D + CircleCollider2D。这些是用于碰撞检测（让敌人碰到士兵时被拦住）。Kinematic 模式下 `MovePosition` 不会立即生效。最简单的修复：**把 Rigidbody2D 改为 Dynamic（但 freezeRotation + gravityScale=0）**，这样 `MovePosition` 才能正常工作。

toolCalls.name: unity_asset
toolCalls.description:
Manage Unity project assets on disk (under "Assets/") such as materials, physics materials, textures/importers, ScriptableObjects, and existing prefabs.

Key uses:
- Read: search assets, get info (optionally with preview), get components from a Prefab asset
- Write: create folders/materials/physics materials/scriptable objects; modify existing assets (including setting Prefab component properties); move/rename/duplicate assets; ensure .meta health

Important notes:
- `create` currently supports only: Folder, Material, PhysicsMaterial, ScriptableObject (Prefab creation is not supported).
- `rename` is effectively a move: pass a full destination asset path (e.g. "Assets/Foo/NewName.ext").
- `generate_preview` can return large base64 payloads; avoid unless you truly need a thumbnail.

Asset (re)import operations are heavy and should only be used when absolutely necessary. Prefer normal Unity import, ensure_*, and script recompilation instead of full reimport.

messages.content:
`MovePosition` 即使 Dynamic 也不立即生效。因为 `MovePosition` 要等下一个物理步。但关键是——**我的代码在 `Update()` 里每帧都调用 `MovePosition`，为什么位置还是不动？**

问题是 z=-1！2D 物理只在 xy 平面工作，z 不应该有值。让我检查士兵是否每帧真的在执行移动代码：

**找到了！** `transform.position` 设为 (12, 5, 0) 了，但 `Rigidbody2D.position` 还在 (9.50, 6.12)！Dynamic Rigidbody2D 会覆盖 transform.position，在下一个物理步把 transform 拉回到 Rigidbody2D.position。

**解决方案：** 必须直接用 `Rigidbody2D.position` 或 `rb.velocity` 来移动，而不是 `transform.position`。让我修复 Soldier.cs：

toolCalls.description:
Analyzes images, videos, and audio files using a multimodal model. This tool accepts local file paths, base64 data, or URLs to multimedia content. Supported formats include common image types (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP, BMP), video formats (MP4, MKV, OGG), and audio formats (MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A).

Key capabilities:
• Visual Agent: Operates PC/mobile GUIs, recognizes UI elements, understands functions, can guide through interface interactions
• Visual Coding: Generates Draw.io diagrams, HTML/CSS/JS code from images/videos
• Text Extraction: Reads and extracts all text from images including documents, receipts, screenshots
• Spatial Perception: Judges object positions, viewpoints, occlusions, provides 2D grounding
• Content Analysis: Describes scenes, identifies objects, analyzes actions in videos
• Audio Understanding: Transcribes speech, identifies sounds, analyzes audio content
• Technical Understanding: Interprets charts, diagrams, technical drawings, code screenshots

The model responds based on your specific prompt. Examples: 'Extract all text from this receipt', 'Generate HTML code for this UI design', 'Identify all clickable elements in this screenshot', 'Describe the spatial relationships between objects', 'Transcribe the speech in this audio', 'What sounds are in this recording?'.

--- Context from: .codely-cli\extensions\unity-master-skill-library\CODELY.md ---
# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产
activate_skill("fbx-humanoid-auto-rig")
activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

game-dev-planner → game-dev-developer → game-dev-debugger → log-analyzer → session-profiler

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene
generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

## 文件结构

sections.name: additional_prompts
sections.text:
## Available Sub-Agents
Use `task` for complex tasks requiring specialized analysis.

- **explore**: Fast read-only codebase search agent for finding files, patterns, and answering questions about the codebase. Use when you need to quickly find files by patterns, search code for keywords, or understand how parts of the codebase work. Specify thoroughness: 'quick' for basic searches, 'medium' for moderate exploration, 'very thorough' for comprehensive analysis.
- **general-purpose**: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you.
- **plan**: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs.
- **3d-model-generator**: Generates static (non-animated) 3D models in Unity using AI (defaults to Tripo P1; use Hunyuan 3.1 for high-poly / PBR / FBX output), then places the prefab into the scene
- **ai-generation-planner**: Planning agent for MULTI-TASK AI generation requests in Unity. Only invoke when the user's request involves TWO OR MORE distinct AI generation tasks (e.g. 'generate a character AND a skybox AND a material'). Do NOT invoke for a single generation task — call the appropriate specialist agent directly instead. When invoked, analyzes requirements, decomposes into sub-tasks, resolves dependencies, and produces a structured execution plan.
- **animated-character-generator**: Generates rigged humanoid 3D characters with animations in Unity using Meshy AI, with automatic rotation correction to ensure the character stands upright and faces the camera
- **audio-generator**: Generates background music (BGM) and sound effects (SFX) in Unity using AI, correctly configures AudioSource settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder audio files
- **image-generator**: Generates image assets (Texture2D PNG) in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images. Supports 火山 SeeDream (default, with size/segmentation options) and Frontier (stylized effects). Use this agent for general-purpose image generation — concept art, UI backgrounds, textures, posters, banners — NOT for game sprites with transparent backgrounds (use sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator instead).
- **material-generator**: Generates PBR surface material assets (seamless PNG texture + Unity .mat file) in Unity using Huoshan SeeDream AI from text prompts, reference images, or material type presets
- **search-assets**: Searches and downloads pre-made Unity assets from the cloud library, then places them in the scene. Use for '搜索资产', 'find a cat model', 'download a spaceship prefab', 'search the asset library for furniture', or any request to find/download existing Unity assets rather than generating new ones.
- **skybox-generator**: Generates Cubemap skybox assets in Unity using Rodin AI from text prompts or reference images, with automatic scene assignment via placeholder workflow
- **sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator**: Handles ALL 2D sprite and sprite sequence tasks in Unity. Three modes — choose based on inputs: Mode A (Sprite only): user wants a static 2D sprite (icon, portrait, UI element, item image), no animation needed; Mode B (Sequence only): user wants a sprite sequence animation AND already has an existing image (image_path is provided); Mode C (Sprite → Sequence): user wants a sprite sequence animation but has NO existing image — generate the sprite first, wait for completion, then use the result as image_path for generate_sprite_sequence. Always use this agent for any combination of sprite and/or sprite sequence generation.
- **video-generator**: Generates video assets in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images, correctly configures VideoPlayer settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder video files
- **editor-module-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 MODULE 子代理 - 按模块使用 Unity 工具与必要的脚本改动完成任务，在不违反 global_requirements_md 约束的前提下通过 Console focus→clear→read 门禁确保编译 0 error，并用 complete_task 回传 handoff_json
- **editor-plan-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 PLAN 子代理 - 严格依照 global_requirements_md 生成模块化 ExecutionPlan.md


## Task Tool (Subagent Dispatch)

The `task` tool is the primary way to launch subagents for complex, multi-step tasks.
- For a single straightforward delegation, call `task` directly without creating a job.
- When a task corresponds to an existing planned job, pass `job_id` so the Task and Job systems stay linked.
- For simple, directed codebase searches (e.g. for a specific file/class/function), use `glob` or `search_file_content` directly.
- For broader codebase exploration and deep research, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="explore". It is faster and read-only. Use this when a simple search proves insufficient or when your task requires more than 3 queries.
- When the user asks to design, architect, or plan before implementing, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="plan" — it explores the codebase and returns a step-by-step plan with critical files.

--- Context from: .codely-cli\extensions\unity-master-skill-library\CODELY.md ---
# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")
```

## Available Sub-Agents
Use `task` for complex tasks requiring specialized analysis.

- **explore**: Fast read-only codebase search agent for finding files, patterns, and answering questions about the codebase. Use when you need to quickly find files by patterns, search code for keywords, or understand how parts of the codebase work. Specify thoroughness: 'quick' for basic searches, 'medium' for moderate exploration, 'very thorough' for comprehensive analysis.
- **general-purpose**: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you.
- **plan**: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs.
- **3d-model-generator**: Generates static (non-animated) 3D models in Unity using AI (defaults to Tripo P1; use Hunyuan 3.1 for high-poly / PBR / FBX output), then places the prefab into the scene
- **ai-generation-planner**: Planning agent for MULTI-TASK AI generation requests in Unity. Only invoke when the user's request involves TWO OR MORE distinct AI generation tasks (e.g. 'generate a character AND a skybox AND a material'). Do NOT invoke for a single generation task — call the appropriate specialist agent directly instead. When invoked, analyzes requirements, decomposes into sub-tasks, resolves dependencies, and produces a structured execution plan.
- **animated-character-generator**: Generates rigged humanoid 3D characters with animations in Unity using Meshy AI, with automatic rotation correction to ensure the character stands upright and faces the camera
- **audio-generator**: Generates background music (BGM) and sound effects (SFX) in Unity using AI, correctly configures AudioSource settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder audio files
- **image-generator**: Generates image assets (Texture2D PNG) in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images. Supports 火山 SeeDream (default, with size/segmentation options) and Frontier (stylized effects). Use this agent for general-purpose image generation — concept art, UI backgrounds, textures, posters, banners — NOT for game sprites with transparent backgrounds (use sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator instead).
- **material-generator**: Generates PBR surface material assets (seamless PNG texture + Unity .mat file) in Unity using Huoshan SeeDream AI from text prompts, reference images, or material type presets
- **search-assets**: Searches and downloads pre-made Unity assets from the cloud library, then places them in the scene. Use for '搜索资产', 'find a cat model', 'download a spaceship prefab', 'search the asset library for furniture', or any request to find/download existing Unity assets rather than generating new ones.
- **skybox-generator**: Generates Cubemap skybox assets in Unity using Rodin AI from text prompts or reference images, with automatic scene assignment via placeholder workflow
- **sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator**: Handles ALL 2D sprite and sprite sequence tasks in Unity. Three modes — choose based on inputs: Mode A (Sprite only): user wants a static 2D sprite (icon, portrait, UI element, item image), no animation needed; Mode B (Sequence only): user wants a sprite sequence animation AND already has an existing image (image_path is provided); Mode C (Sprite → Sequence): user wants a sprite sequence animation but has NO existing image — generate the sprite first, wait for completion, then use the result as image_path for generate_sprite_sequence. Always use this agent for any combination of sprite and/or sprite sequence generation.
- **video-generator**: Generates video assets in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images, correctly configures VideoPlayer settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder video files
- **editor-module-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 MODULE 子代理 - 按模块使用 Unity 工具与必要的脚本改动完成任务，在不违反 global_requirements_md 约束的前提下通过 Console focus→clear→read 门禁确保编译 0 error，并用 complete_task 回传 handoff_json
- **editor-plan-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 PLAN 子代理 - 严格依照 global_requirements_md 生成模块化 ExecutionPlan.md


## Task Tool (Subagent Dispatch)

The `task` tool is the primary way to launch subagents for complex, multi-step tasks.
- For a single straightforward delegation, call `task` directly without creating a job.
- When a task corresponds to an existing planned job, pass `job_id` so the Task and Job systems stay linked.
- For simple, directed codebase searches (e.g. for a specific file/class/function), use `glob` or `search_file_content` directly.
- For broader codebase exploration and deep research, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="explore". It is faster and read-only. Use this when a simple search proves insufficient or when your task requires more than 3 queries.
- When the user asks to design, architect, or plan before implementing, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="plan" — it explores the codebase and returns a step-by-step plan with critical files.
